reviews.comment:
Siempre que voy a San Clemente cargo en esta estación y siempre muy conforme, solo quiero remarcar que debería ofrecerte la limpieza de vidrios y eso, no paso como si hacen en la YPF de San Bernardo.

(Translated by Google)
Whenever I go to San Clemente I fill up at this station and I'm always very satisfied. I just want to point out that they should offer windshield cleaning and such, unlike what they do at the YPF in San Bernardo.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoM1lTRjVnRRAB

reviews.comment:
El servicio de taller mecánico es una truchads, lleve mi auto por un problema y me quisieron engrampar uno q vale la mitad, al no acceder a su proposición me armaron el motor de mala gana y me quisieron pegar cuando fui a retirarlo quedando mi auto ahí. Llamé a la policía y les una denuncia. Ahora voy por defensa al consumidor porque me rompieron el auto. Me intentaron devolver el auto sin embrague. Son unos estafadores violentos.. hágale el favor a su vehículo y no lo lleve a ese lugar ni a inflar las ruedas. Salí a los gritos pidiendo ayuda que llamen a la policía escapando de la paliza q intentaba darme el mecánico. Todos me vieron y nadie hizo nada, pregunte a los playeros si había algún responsable a cargo y miraron para otro lado. Un descontrol, una desidia total

(Translated by Google)
The mechanic shop is a scam. I took my car there for a problem, and they tried to sell me a part that costs half as much. When I refused, they haphazardly reassembled the engine and tried to hit me when I went to pick it up, leaving my car there. I called the police and filed a report. Now I'm going to consumer protection because they wrecked my car. They tried to return it to me without a clutch. They're violent swindlers. Do your vehicle a favor and don't take it to that place, not even to get your tires inflated. I ran out screaming for help, begging someone to call the police, trying to escape the beating the mechanic was trying to give me. Everyone saw me, and nobody did anything. I asked the attendants if there was anyone in charge, and they looked the other way. It's completely out of control, utter negligence.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURocmNxa1l3EAE

reviews.comment:
Para cargar nafta todo bien, pero para el lavadero no vi buena predisposición por parte del muchacho, además dijo que se le había roto el compresor y sólo lavaba por fuera. No sé si es casualidad o qué pero no me gustó ese servicio.

(Translated by Google)
Getting gas was fine, but the guy at the car wash wasn't very helpful. He even said his compressor was broken and he could only wash the exterior. I don't know if it was a coincidence or what, but I didn't like the service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoamE3MmVBEAE
